verses.1: For the music director; according to Jeduthun. A Psalm of David. My soul waits in silence for God alone; From Him comes my salvation.
verses.2: He alone is my rock and my salvation, My stronghold; I will not be greatly shaken.
verses.3: How long will you attack a man, That you may murder him, all of you, Like a leaning wall, like a tottering fence?
verses.4: They have planned only to thrust him down from his high position; They delight in falsehood; They bless with their mouth, But inwardly they curse. Selah
verses.5: My soul, wait in silence for God alone, For my hope is from Him.
verses.6: He alone is my rock and my salvation, My refuge; I will not be shaken.
verses.7: My salvation and my glory rest on God; The rock of my strength, my refuge is in God.
verses.8: Trust in Him at all times, you people; Pour out your hearts before Him; God is a refuge for us. Selah
verses.9: People of low standing are only breath, and people of rank are a lie; In the balances they go up. Together they are lighter than breath.
verses.10: Do not trust in oppression, And do not vainly rely on robbery; If wealth increases, do not set your heart on it.
verses.11: God has spoken once; Twice I have heard this: That power belongs to God;
verses.12: And faithfulness is Yours, Lord, For You reward a person according to his work.
